name: whitebox-pro-server-plugin-geolocation
description: WhiteBox server plugin — passive, no-permission-prompt IP geolocation. Piggybacks on the /sessions/resolve call every client SDK already makes (via sessions.onResolve), so the visitor's coarse location is known immediately, and records it as core facts (geo_country/geo_region/geo_city/geo_lat/geo_lon) for selector/audience segmentation.
